text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon flips the script on her critics with
a stunning race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her next race is the long-distance Spring Stakes,
which is 1,800 meters long. She determines she
needs more stamina training to complete it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On our way home, we run into Rice Shower at the
racecourse's entrance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's completely starstruck by Mihono Bourbon's
performance, and manages to offer her some
words of praise before fleeing shyly.
